title: Measuring to the Nearest Quarter Inch

steps.instruction: Place one end at the 0 mark on the ruler.
steps.explanation: Always start measuring from 0 (or note the start mark).

steps.instruction: The other end falls between marks. Identify the nearest quarter-inch mark.
steps.work: The end is at the 3rd mark past 2 inches. Each inch has 4 marks (quarters).
steps.explanation: 4 marks per inch: 1/4, 1/2, 3/4, and the next inch.

title: Measuring Between Two Marks (Not Starting at 0)

steps.instruction: The object starts at the 1-inch mark and ends at 3 1/2 inches.
steps.explanation: When an object doesn't start at 0, subtract.
Always subtract the start mark from the end mark.
